title: Draper 6mm Combination Spanner | Heavy Duty Chrome Vanadium Steel Hand Tool | Long Pattern Metric Manual Plated Tools | 68028
features: Durable - Crafted from chrome vanadium steel, our 36mm spanner is hardened, tempered and chrome plated for maximum durability and performance
Effective – Featuring jaws offset at 15°, our spanner offers enhanced access and manoeuvrability in tight spaces
Reliable – Peace of mind with Draper tools quality guaranteed for reliability and performance
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper 68028 Metric Combination Spanner,Blue,6 mm Draper combination spanner made from chrome vanadium steel that’s been hardened and tempered for extra strength. Each spanner has a matt chrome finish and the jaws are offset at 15. Ideal spanner for everyday use around the home or workshop.
